message:
fix(algorithms): improve MIS determinism, clique efficiency, and error handling

maximal_independent_set: Replace the non-deterministic random-removal
loop with a deterministic Fisher-Yates shuffle (when seed is provided)
followed by a single greedy pass using a blocked-set. This ensures
identical results for the same seed while also being more efficient —
O(V+E) instead of O(V^2) from repeated retain() calls.

max_clique_approx: Switch from Vec-based candidate tracking with
O(n) removal to HashSet-based candidates with O(1)
remove/contains. The greedy heuristic now counts neighbors within
the candidate set directly, improving clarity and performance.

ring_of_cliques, barbell_graph: Return Result<Graph, String> instead
of panicking on invalid inputs (num_cliques < 2, clique_size < 2,
n1 < 2), matching NetworkX's ValueError behavior.

Update Python bindings and digraph module to propagate the new
Result types and FlowError from max_flow functions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
